user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of confirmation notification templates with their type and description, so that I can manage in-app notifications for confirmations
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When the page loads; Then notification templates are listed with Template Type ID, Notification type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a specific notification template, so that I can review its content and settings
acceptance_criteria: Given a notification template is listed; When I click View on that row; Then the template details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the notification templates list, so that I see the latest templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
